name: @gitgecko/plug-sandbox-dry-run-guard
description: The second sandbox plug (INV-2.3 proving plug) — fits the sandbox socket alongside plug-sandbox-backends. A policy-only backend that validates ExecSpecs against the isolation policy (command blocklist, network deny, timeout, env constraints) and returns a dry-run result describing what WOULD happen, without actually executing anything. Useful for CI pre-checks, security audits, and test environments where real execution is unsafe or unnecessary. Proves the exclusive interchangeability invariant: either this backend or the subprocess backend can be the active sandbox.
